evidence_refs.summary: The Gateway wait endpoint sends one current user message into the selected thread and waits for that run to finish.
The Gateway message endpoint returns displayable messages for the thread, so verifier must select one current business AI message without combining older tools.
The checked-out NBEV skill declares the business planning workflow and script interface available at this source revision.
The repository interaction guide documents the intended NBEV request and artifact flow; it is background until aligned with a current runtime trace.

The checked-out lead-agent prompt prioritizes clarification whenever information is unclear or missing; it is a repair surface, but requires deployment alignment and replay before it can prove a historical case cause.
Current verifier selects the latest non-middleware AI message and takes reply and tool calls from that same object.
Current verifier derives stage from the selected reply, tools and detected scripts; this field is not returned by Gateway.
In turn two the latest raw business AI message contains a complete plan and no tool calls, while the historical extracted output retained ask_clarification and stage clarification.

tool_requirements.description: Deterministically recompute a plan budget from cost components quoted from the current business output, compare it with the claimed total and budget ceiling, and preserve each quote.
tool_requirements.applicable_scenario: A Judge gap concerns a numeric budget ceiling and the current business output states the cost components needed to recompute the plan total.

budget_limit.description: Budget ceiling stated by the current user/output.

claimed_total.description: Optional total claimed by the business output.

components.description: Cost components copied from the current business output, each with its original quote.

tool_requirements.description: Replay the current verifier extraction and stage inference on one exact Gateway message-history array, returning the selected latest non-middleware AI message, its tool calls, and the derived stage.
tool_requirements.applicable_scenario: A Judge gap depends on reply_text, tool_calls, scripts_called, or stage and the current trace contains Gateway message history that can distinguish business output from verifier extraction.

messages.description: One current turn's exact Gateway message-history array from RunTrace raw_response.

artifacts.docs/traces/gateway-message-flow.mmd: machine-readable Gateway, verifier derivation, and NBEV skill topology
artifacts.docs/traces/gateway-message-flow.md: operational index and extraction-versus-business attribution procedure
machine-readable cumulative-input, clarification-policy, and planning-execution topology
operational index for repeated clarification and transition to planning

unresolved_reason: No new deployment-aligned Gateway trace was captured because the configured business service was unavailable. Historical reports deterministically reproduce verifier extraction behavior but do not expose the deployed deer-flow revision; checked-out skill/source evidence cannot prove hidden model or skill selection for those old runs.
